arabic:
عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏لا يحل للمرأة أن تصوم وزوجها شاهد إلا بإذنه، ولا تأذن في بيته إلا بإذنه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "It is not lawful for a woman to observe an optional Saum (fast) without the permission of her husband when he is at home. Nor should she allow anyone to enter his house without his permission.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
